channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Pakistan hosts regional powers for Iran talks with focus on Hormuz proposals
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Pakistan prepares to host peace talks as Iran accuses US of ground assault plans
- Pakistan prepares to host peace talks as Iran accuses US of ground assault plans
- Pakistan prepares to host peace talks as Iran accuses US of ground assault plans
